messages.content:

Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

While some people may find these conversations stressful or overwhelming, I have found that approaching them with empathy, understanding, and a willingness to listen can go a long way in managing conflicts and promoting productive dialogue.
